_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The analyst's trust weight (7.67) edges the call toward HOLD given 0/18 directional accuracy and unresolved ETF-vs-MVRV divergence, while the narrative's high-confidence bottom analog keeps the lean from turning bearish — net result is hold-and-watch rather than commit.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial split — analyst says HOLD with low conviction; narrative implies upside relief building but does not explicitly call a direction, creating an asymmetry between structural caution and narrative optimism
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed breaks below 25 with VIX >20 and funding drops below 0.0005%
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows sustain above 90 with btc_momentum_30d clearing 70 and DXY breaks below 100
